title: Sweet and Savory Date Chestnut Bliss Delight
description: A unique dessert combining the sweetness of dates, the earthiness of chestnuts, and the crunch of bliss seeds.
instructions: Arrange the chestnuts on a baking sheet and roast for 10-12 minutes, or until caramelized.
Meanwhile, toast the bliss seeds in a dry pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a blender, combine the roasted chestnuts, chopped dates, toasted bliss seeds, night-blooming jasmine syrup (or honey), and melted butter. Blend until smooth.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
Optional: Garnish with additional toasted bliss seeds and chopped dates, if desired.
